title: monilia
intro: Monilia, also known as Monilinia, is a type of fungal disease that affects various plants, particularly fruit trees and shrubs. It is characterized by the presence of powdery mildew and black fruit rot. The medicinal properties of Monilia include its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive problems. Monilia has been prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which are used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
